sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81899" key="peripi/melos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιπίμελος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n81899.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very fat</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Xenocr.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:2:58:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.58.11</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:233" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.233</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
